meaning: n.尊敬,敬重,注意,考虑,尊重,关系,有关,敬意vt.尊敬,尊重,不防碍
examples: I respect him as a doctor.
She promised to respect our wishes.
He has no respect for her feelings.
Mr Paes promised to "work hard and treat the citizens with a lot of respect".
He has broken sharply with the fiscal pattern of earlier Labour governments in one respect, however.
